sign.description: Adds signature to PDF by drawing, text or image

addText.description: Add custom text anywhere in your PDF

addPassword.description: Add password protection and restrictions to PDF files

removePassword.description: Remove password protection from PDF documents

removePages.title: Remove Pages - Stirling PDF
removePages.description: Remove specific pages from a PDF document

removeBlanks.description: Remove blank pages from PDF documents

removeAnnotations.description: Remove annotations and comments from PDF documents

removeImage.title: Remove Images - Stirling PDF
removeImage.description: Remove all images from a PDF document

watermark.title: Add Watermark - Stirling PDF
watermark.description: Add a custom watermark to your PDF document.

sanitize.title: Sanitize - Stirling PDF
sanitize.description: Remove potentially harmful elements from PDF files

merge.title: Merge - Stirling PDF
merge.description: Merge multiple PDFs into a single document

convert.description: Convert files to and from PDF format

ocr.title: OCR - Stirling PDF
ocr.description: Extract text from scanned PDFs using Optical Character Recognition

addImage.title: Add Image - Stirling PDF
addImage.description: Add images anywhere in your PDF

annotate.title: Annotate - Stirling PDF
annotate.description: Highlight, draw, add notes, and shapes directly in the viewer

scannerImageSplit.title: Detect & Split Scanned Photos - Stirling PDF
scannerImageSplit.description: Detect and split scanned photos into separate pages

editTableOfContents.title: Edit Table of Contents - Stirling PDF
editTableOfContents.description: Add or edit bookmarks and table of contents in PDF documents

scannerEffect.title: Scanner Effect - Stirling PDF
scannerEffect.description: Create a PDF that looks like it was scanned

autoRename.title: Auto Rename PDF File - Stirling PDF
autoRename.description: Automatically rename PDF files based on their content

pageLayout.title: Multi-Page Layout - Stirling PDF
pageLayout.description: Merge multiple pages of a PDF document into a single page

scalePages.title: Adjust page size/scale - Stirling PDF
scalePages.description: Change the size/scale of a page and/or its contents.

adjustContrast.title: Adjust Colors/Contrast - Stirling PDF
adjustContrast.description: Adjust colors and contrast of PDF documents

crop.title: Crop PDF - Stirling PDF
crop.description: Crop a PDF to reduce its size (maintains text!)

pdfToSinglePage.title: PDF to Single Large Page - Stirling PDF
pdfToSinglePage.description: Merges all PDF pages into one large single page

repair.title: Repair - Stirling PDF
repair.description: Repair corrupted or damaged PDF files

compare.title: Compare - Stirling PDF
compare.description: Compare two PDF documents and highlight differences

addPageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers - Stirling PDF
addPageNumbers.description: Add Page numbers throughout a document in a set location

redact.title: Redact - Stirling PDF
redact.description: Permanently remove sensitive information from PDF documents

flatten.title: Flatten - Stirling PDF
flatten.description: Remove all interactive elements and forms from a PDF

removeCertSign.title: Remove Certificate Sign - Stirling PDF
removeCertSign.description: Remove digital signature from PDF documents

unlockPDFForms.title: Unlock PDF Forms - Stirling PDF
unlockPDFForms.description: Remove read-only property of form fields in a PDF document.

compress.title: Compress - Stirling PDF
compress.description: Compress PDFs to reduce their file size.

extractPages.title: Extract Pages - Stirling PDF
extractPages.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF document

reorganizePages.title: Reorganize Pages - Stirling PDF
reorganizePages.description: Rearrange, duplicate, or delete PDF pages with visual drag-and-drop control.

addStamp.title: Add Stamp to PDF - Stirling PDF
addStamp.description: Add text or add image stamps at set locations

addAttachments.title: Add Attachments - Stirling PDF
addAttachments.description: Add or remove embedded files (attachments) to/from a PDF

changeMetadata.title: Change Metadata - Stirling PDF
changeMetadata.description: Change/Remove/Add metadata from a PDF document

overlayPdfs.title: Overlay Pdfs - Stirling PDF
overlayPdfs.description: The Free Adobe Acrobat alternative (10M+ Downloads)

getPdfInfo.title: Get ALL Info on PDF - Stirling PDF
getPdfInfo.description: Grabs any and all information possible on PDFs

validateSignature.title: Validate PDF Signature - Stirling PDF
validateSignature.description: Verify digital signatures and certificates in PDF documents

timestampPdf.title: Timestamp PDF - Stirling PDF
timestampPdf.description: Add an RFC 3161 document timestamp to prove when your PDF existed

replaceColor.title: Replace & Invert Color - Stirling PDF
replaceColor.description: Replace or invert colors in PDF documents

showJS.title: Show JavaScript - Stirling PDF
showJS.description: Extract and display JavaScript code from PDF documents

bookletImposition.title: Booklet Imposition - Stirling PDF
bookletImposition.description: Create booklets with proper page ordering and multi-page layout for printing and binding

pdfTextEditor.title: PDF Text Editor - Stirling PDF
pdfTextEditor.description: Review and edit text and images in PDFs with grouped text editing and PDF regeneration

formFill.title: Fill Form - Stirling PDF
formFill.description: Fill PDF form fields interactively with a visual editor

multiTool.title: Multi-Tool - Stirling PDF
multiTool.description: Use multiple tools on a single PDF document

read.title: Read - Stirling PDF
read.description: View and annotate PDFs. Highlight text, draw, or insert comments for review and collaboration.

automate.title: Automate - Stirling PDF
automate.description: Build multi-step workflows by chaining together PDF actions. Ideal for recurring tasks.
